title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor with Python 3.14
description: Python, HTTP, web, data-structure, and Git learners who need to design, build, test, operate, and defend an authorized bounded crawler and accessible site-quality auditor instead of copy a brittle requests-and-selector script. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate python 3.14.6; authorization, ethics, privacy, and legal-review routing; reproducible environments; bounded crawl scope; url resolution and conservative identity; rfc 9309 robots and sitemaps; httpx retrieval and prerequisite http reuse; response bytes and encoding; whatwg-informed html parsing and parser differentials; beautiful soup 4.15 and lxml 6.1; css selectors and typed extraction; provenance; link discovery; crawl graphs and frontier state; url traps; per-origin politeness; structured asyncio concurrency; authenticated-session boundaries; incremental validators and checkpoints; exact and near duplicate evidence; search indexing, canonical, hreflang, json-ld, and social metadata; wcag-informed accessibility auditing with human review; resource and performance evidence; playwright 1.61 authorized dynamic rendering; block and captcha stop policy with no evasion; ssrf and untrusted-content defense; csv, json lines, and accessible reports; deterministic fixtures, local servers, property and mutation evidence; scrapy 2.17 architecture and autothrottle; packaging, scheduling, operations, migration, rollback, recovery, and production defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate runnable deterministic pure-python evidence using original fixed fixtures plus explicit dns, network, http library, parser, filesystem, browser, target-owner, accessibility, privacy, security, legal-review, load, and production transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five cumulative authentic crawler and site-audit deliveries and a performance-based unfamiliar-site defense examination through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
sharedRequirements: Every activity retrieves stakeholder outcome, authorization, revision, Python and dependency versions, seed and origin, URL and scope policy, robots decision, response and parser identity, extraction provenance, crawl state, privacy and accessibility requirement, bounded work, changed-case test, failure, recovery, and explicit browser-versus-controlled-system limits before adding one crawler boundary.

Browser Python uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure functions. It does not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; those require controlled evidence.

Passing work requires stable scenario and artifact identity, prediction, intermediate URL, response, tree, field, graph, or state evidence, exact observable output, a changed and rejected case, a test that detects a deliberate defect, accessible stakeholder evidence, and a named owner for remaining risk.

competencies.statement: Define the stakeholder decision, users, page population, evidence, success, failure, review cadence, and observable value before choosing crawler technology.
misconceptions: Collecting many pages is itself a useful stakeholder outcome.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define the stakeholder decision, users, page population, evidence, success, failure, review cadence, and observable value before choosing crawler technology.

competencies.statement: Record who controls the target, what access is authorized, which identities and paths are permitted, and who can pause or revoke the crawl.
misconceptions: Public reachability alone implies authorization to automate access.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record who controls the target, what access is authorized, which identities and paths are permitted, and who can pause or revoke the crawl.

competencies.statement: Separate technical policy from terms, contracts, copyright, privacy, and jurisdiction questions and route uncertain cases to qualified review.
misconceptions: robots.txt is a universal legal permission document.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate technical policy from terms, contracts, copyright, privacy, and jurisdiction questions and route uncertain cases to qualified review.

competencies.statement: Define purpose, minimum fields, consent or authority, retention, access, deletion, and aggregation risk before collecting personal data.
misconceptions: Public personal data has no privacy or retention boundary.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define purpose, minimum fields, consent or authority, retention, access, deletion, and aggregation risk before collecting personal data.

competencies.statement: Separate deterministic model, parser, local-server, controlled-site, browser-render, load, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, and production evidence.
misconceptions: A successful request and CSV file prove a crawler is correct and acceptable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate deterministic model, parser, local-server, controlled-site, browser-render, load, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, and production evidence.

competencies.statement: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, data fixtures, licenses, secrets, and a recovery anchor before editing.
misconceptions: A small scraper does not need repository or rollback evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, data fixtures, licenses, secrets, and a recovery anchor before editing.

competencies.statement: Record Python implementation and version, platform, SSL backend, event-loop assumptions, encoding environment, and supported runtime matrix.
misconceptions: Any Python 3 interpreter gives identical networking, parser, and concurrency behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record Python implementation and version, platform, SSL backend, event-loop assumptions, encoding environment, and supported runtime matrix.

competencies.statement: Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify hashes and sources, review licenses and advisories, and prove clean installation.
misconceptions: Listing broad minimum versions is enough for reproducible crawler behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify hashes and sources, review licenses and advisories, and prove clean installation.

competencies.statement: Choose html.parser, Beautiful Soup, lxml, or browser parsing from malformed-input behavior, performance, portability, and security evidence.
misconceptions: All HTML parsers build the same tree from real-world markup.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose html.parser, Beautiful Soup, lxml, or browser parsing from malformed-input behavior, performance, portability, and security evidence.

competencies.statement: Recreate the tool from a clean environment and reconcile versions, fixtures, default configuration, output digest, and shutdown state.
misconceptions: A working developer environment proves the declared dependency set is complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Recreate the tool from a clean environment and reconcile versions, fixtures, default configuration, output digest, and shutdown state.

competencies.statement: Record each seed URL, stakeholder, purpose, authorization source, expected content class, and crawl revision.
misconceptions: A hostname is a sufficient crawl seed and evidence identity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record each seed URL, stakeholder, purpose, authorization source, expected content class, and crawl revision.

competencies.statement: Define allowed schemes, normalized hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default rules.
misconceptions: Same registrable domain always means same authority and risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define allowed schemes, normalized hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default rules.

competencies.statement: Express permitted paths, methods, query keys, values, pagination, fragments, and content types as testable admission rules.
misconceptions: Following every same-host href keeps a crawler in scope.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Express permitted paths, methods, query keys, values, pagination, fragments, and content types as testable admission rules.

competencies.statement: Budget pages, depth, requests, redirects, bytes, decompressed bytes, time, concurrency, retries, disk, browser contexts, and report rows.
misconceptions: A delay between requests prevents every form of crawler overload.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Budget pages, depth, requests, redirects, bytes, decompressed bytes, time, concurrency, retries, disk, browser contexts, and report rows.

competencies.statement: Define automatic stop signals, manual kill paths, owner contact, partial-output handling, cleanup, and restart authorization.
misconceptions: A crawler should keep retrying until it eventually completes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define automatic stop signals, manual kill paths, owner contact, partial-output handling, cleanup, and restart authorization.

competencies.statement: Parse scheme, authority, userinfo, host, port, path, query, and fragment without treating a URL as a trustworthy string.
misconceptions: Splitting a URL on slashes and question marks preserves its meaning.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse scheme, authority, userinfo, host, port, path, query, and fragment without treating a URL as a trustworthy string.

competencies.statement: Resolve relative, scheme-relative, path-relative, query-only, and fragment-only references against the effective document base.
misconceptions: String concatenation correctly resolves every relative link.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve relative, scheme-relative, path-relative, query-only, and fragment-only references against the effective document base.

competencies.statement: Remove fragments from network-fetch identity while preserving them when the stakeholder report needs document-location evidence.
misconceptions: Different fragments always require separate HTTP requests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Remove fragments from network-fetch identity while preserving them when the stakeholder report needs document-location evidence.

competencies.statement: Define conservative scheme, host, port, path, percent-encoding, query-order, and tracking-parameter normalization without merging distinct resources.
misconceptions: Lowercasing and sorting every URL component is safe canonicalization.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define conservative scheme, host, port, path, percent-encoding, query-order, and tracking-parameter normalization without merging distinct resources.

competencies.statement: Keep display and network host forms distinct, validate Unicode and IDNA conversions, and make confusable or failed conversions visible.
misconceptions: Unicode hostnames and their ASCII forms are interchangeable without validation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep display and network host forms distinct, validate Unicode and IDNA conversions, and make confusable or failed conversions visible.

competencies.statement: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin and use an honest stable product token and contact identity.
misconceptions: Any robots.txt path or wildcard user-agent label represents the same crawler.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin and use an honest stable product token and contact identity.

competencies.statement: Apply RFC 9309 group selection, rule matching, percent encoding, longest-match precedence, and allow-over-disallow tie behavior.
misconceptions: The first textual rule that mentions a path always wins.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply RFC 9309 group selection, rule matching, percent encoding, longest-match precedence, and allow-over-disallow tie behavior.

competencies.statement: Handle successful, unavailable, unreachable, redirect, oversized, and stale robots responses with explicit cache and conservative stop policy.
misconceptions: Every robots fetch failure means unrestricted crawling.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Handle successful, unavailable, unreachable, redirect, oversized, and stale robots responses with explicit cache and conservative stop policy.

competencies.statement: Treat crawl-delay, request-rate, and other extensions as documented policy inputs without claiming RFC 9309 requires them.
misconceptions: crawl-delay is a normative RFC 9309 directive supported identically everywhere.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat crawl-delay, request-rate, and other extensions as documented policy inputs without claiming RFC 9309 requires them.

competencies.statement: Parse bounded UTF-8 sitemap and index files, enforce location and host rules, validate escaping, and treat change and priority fields as hints.
misconceptions: Every sitemap URL is authorized, current, unique, and mandatory to crawl.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse bounded UTF-8 sitemap and index files, enforce location and host rules, validate escaping, and treat change and priority fields as hints.

competencies.statement: Reuse one configured client or bounded pool and close it deliberately so connection, proxy, TLS, cookie, and resource ownership are visible.
misconceptions: Creating one client per URL is the cleanest isolation strategy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reuse one configured client or bounded pool and close it deliberately so connection, proxy, TLS, cookie, and resource ownership are visible.

competencies.statement: Use safe retrieval methods and an honest User-Agent, Accept, Accept-Encoding, conditional, and contact policy without impersonation.
misconceptions: Copying a consumer browser header set makes a crawler compliant.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use safe retrieval methods and an honest User-Agent, Accept, Accept-Encoding, conditional, and contact policy without impersonation.

competencies.statement: Classify transport, status, media type, length, content coding, and domain outcomes before parsing the representation.
misconceptions: Status 200 or an html suffix proves the body is usable HTML.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify transport, status, media type, length, content coding, and domain outcomes before parsing the representation.

competencies.statement: Resolve each redirect, reapply authorization, origin, credential, method, loop, and budget policy, and retain the complete chain.
misconceptions: A permitted initial URL makes every redirect destination permitted.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve each redirect, reapply authorization, origin, credential, method, loop, and budget policy, and retain the complete chain.

competencies.statement: Enforce compressed and expanded byte limits during streaming, close partial bodies, and retain a visible rejection reason.
misconceptions: Checking Content-Length before a full read prevents oversized responses.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Enforce compressed and expanded byte limits during streaming, close partial bodies, and retain a visible rejection reason.

competencies.statement: Track wire, compressed, decompressed, decoded, and retained sizes and stop before an expansion or memory budget is exceeded.
misconceptions: A small compressed response is necessarily cheap to decode.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Track wire, compressed, decompressed, decoded, and retained sizes and stop before an expansion or memory budget is exceeded.

competencies.statement: Validate and apply declared content codings in order while distinguishing unsupported, corrupt, partial, and over-budget representations.
misconceptions: Unknown or corrupt compression should be passed to the HTML parser.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate and apply declared content codings in order while distinguishing unsupported, corrupt, partial, and over-budget representations.

competencies.statement: Record transport declarations, byte-order marks, HTML declarations, parser detection, replacement behavior, and the final chosen encoding.
misconceptions: Calling response.text makes character decoding objectively correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record transport declarations, byte-order marks, HTML declarations, parser detection, replacement behavior, and the final chosen encoding.

competencies.statement: Reject or separately route images, archives, PDFs, XML, JSON, binary downloads, and mislabeled bodies using type and content evidence.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reject or separately route images, archives, PDFs, XML, JSON, binary downloads, and mislabeled bodies using type and content evidence.

competencies.statement: Retain effective URL, response metadata, byte digest, decode decision, parser choice, retrieval time, and fixture or authorization identity.
misconceptions: A normalized text hash is enough to reproduce the fetched source.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain effective URL, response metadata, byte digest, decode decision, parser choice, retrieval time, and fixture or authorization identity.

competencies.statement: Distinguish source bytes, decoded text, tokens, parse errors, the constructed tree, serialized markup, and browser DOM state.

competencies.statement: Predict omitted tags, mismatched nesting, duplicate attributes, character references, templates, foreign content, and recovery effects on target nodes.

competencies.statement: Select html.parser, lxml HTML, lxml XML, or html5lib deliberately and pin that parser in code, tests, and metadata.

competencies.statement: Handle script, style, template, comments, noscript, and raw-text elements without executing them or mistaking directives for visible content.
misconceptions: Parsing HTML safely evaluates page JavaScript and reveals final visible text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Handle script, style, template, comments, noscript, and raw-text elements without executing them or mistaking directives for visible content.

competencies.statement: Compare parser trees on adversarial fixtures and require extraction contracts to state which differences are acceptable.
misconceptions: Parser differential tests are unnecessary once the happy fixture passes.

competencies.statement: Use type, class, ID, attribute, combinator, grouping, and supported pseudo-class selectors with explicit scope and library support.

competencies.statement: State zero, one, optional, at-least-one, and many cardinality expectations and reject ambiguous or duplicate matches.

competencies.statement: Anchor extraction at a stable semantic component and resolve fields relative to it instead of coupling to page-wide positions.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Anchor extraction at a stable semantic component and resolve fields relative to it instead of coupling to page-wide positions.

competencies.statement: Define included descendants, excluded elements, separators, Unicode normalization, whitespace collapse, line boundaries, and empty text.
misconceptions: get_text always reproduces what every user sees and hears.

competencies.statement: Distinguish missing, empty, malformed, relative, repeated, and multi-valued attributes and retain the source node for diagnosis.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish missing, empty, malformed, relative, repeated, and multi-valued attributes and retain the source node for diagnosis.

competencies.statement: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.
misconceptions: A dictionary with familiar keys is a sufficient data contract.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Model raw, parsed, normalized, validated, and exported fields with dataclasses or typed records and a versioned schema.

competencies.statement: Keep missing, empty, unknown, redacted, malformed, not-applicable, and zero values distinct through validation and export.
misconceptions: Empty string, zero, false, and missing all mean no data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep missing, empty, unknown, redacted, malformed, not-applicable, and zero values distinct through validation and export.

competencies.statement: Attach source URL, response identity, selector or rule, node evidence, retrieval time, parser, and transformation history to decisions.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Attach source URL, response identity, selector or rule, node evidence, retrieval time, parser, and transformation history to decisions.

competencies.statement: Normalize Unicode, whitespace, units, dates, numbers, URLs, and labels only after preserving raw input and locale assumptions.
misconceptions: Early normalization cannot erase evidence or merge distinct values.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Normalize Unicode, whitespace, units, dates, numbers, URLs, and labels only after preserving raw input and locale assumptions.

competencies.statement: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.
misconceptions: Keeping invalid rows with a warning is always safer than data loss.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reject, quarantine, or downgrade records by explicit invariant and report the exact field, evidence, and repair owner.

competencies.statement: Extract navigational, embedded, form, metadata, refresh, and structured-data URLs by element and attribute with distinct policies.
misconceptions: Only anchor href attributes contain URLs worth analyzing.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Extract navigational, embedded, form, metadata, refresh, and structured-data URLs by element and attribute with distinct policies.

competencies.statement: Apply effective response URL and the first valid HTML base element deliberately and retain both source and resolved references.
misconceptions: Relative links always resolve against the original seed URL.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply effective response URL and the first valid HTML base element deliberately and retain both source and resolved references.

competencies.statement: Interpret rel tokens such as canonical, alternate, next, prev, nofollow, sponsored, and ugc as evidence or hints, not universal commands.
misconceptions: Every rel token directly controls whether a general-purpose crawler may fetch a link.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Interpret rel tokens such as canonical, alternate, next, prev, nofollow, sponsored, and ugc as evidence or hints, not universal commands.

competencies.statement: Resolve, validate syntax, remove fetch fragments, canonicalize conservatively, apply authorization and robots policy, then deduplicate before scheduling.
misconceptions: Deduplicating raw href strings before resolution prevents repeat work.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve, validate syntax, remove fetch fragments, canonicalize conservatively, apply authorization and robots policy, then deduplicate before scheduling.

competencies.statement: Retain parent page, node or metadata source, raw reference, resolved URL, relation, anchor context, decision, and rejection reason.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain parent page, node or metadata source, raw reference, resolved URL, relation, anchor context, decision, and rejection reason.

competencies.statement: Represent pages, fetch identities, redirect edges, discovery edges, canonical hints, embedded resources, and rejection states separately.
misconceptions: A flat visited set captures the complete crawl graph.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Represent pages, fetch identities, redirect edges, discovery edges, canonical hints, embedded resources, and rejection states separately.

competencies.statement: Choose FIFO, depth-first, priority, sitemap, recrawl, or hybrid ordering from stakeholder value and fairness requirements.
misconceptions: Breadth-first order is objectively correct for every crawler.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose FIFO, depth-first, priority, sitemap, recrawl, or hybrid ordering from stakeholder value and fairness requirements.

competencies.statement: Reserve an admitted URL atomically before scheduling and reconcile queued, active, completed, redirected, rejected, and retry states.
misconceptions: Marking visited only after success cannot produce duplicate concurrent work.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reserve an admitted URL atomically before scheduling and reconcile queued, active, completed, redirected, rejected, and retry states.

competencies.statement: Record first and alternate parents, discovery depth, relation, priority, and scope decision without making completion order define depth.
misconceptions: Async completion order is a stable crawl-depth definition.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record first and alternate parents, discovery depth, relation, priority, and scope decision without making completion order define depth.

competencies.statement: Use stable tie-breakers and seeded fixtures so the same admitted graph yields a reproducible decision and report order.
misconceptions: Deterministic tests require disabling concurrency entirely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use stable tie-breakers and seeded fixtures so the same admitted graph yields a reproducible decision and report order.

competencies.statement: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.
misconceptions: Removing duplicate query keys eliminates faceted navigation traps.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.

competencies.statement: Bound date ranges, next and previous traversal, generated archives, and cyclic calendar links against stakeholder time scope.
misconceptions: A maximum depth automatically bounds calendar URLs.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound date ranges, next and previous traversal, generated archives, and cyclic calendar links against stakeholder time scope.

competencies.statement: Identify session, tracking, nonce, cache-buster, and personalized parameters without deleting unknown keys by guesswork.
misconceptions: Every long or random query value can be stripped safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Identify session, tracking, nonce, cache-buster, and personalized parameters without deleting unknown keys by guesswork.

competencies.statement: Stop pagination on semantic end evidence, repeated content identity, next-link cycles, page budget, or contract violation.
misconceptions: Incrementing a page number until a request fails is robust pagination.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop pagination on semantic end evidence, repeated content identity, next-link cycles, page budget, or contract violation.

competencies.statement: Measure discovery growth, unique-content yield, rejection ratios, queue age, and owner-defined value to stop expanding traps early.
misconceptions: A global request cap is sufficient diagnosis for an infinite URL space.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure discovery growth, unique-content yield, rejection ratios, queue age, and owner-defined value to stop expanding traps early.

competencies.statement: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
misconceptions: Sleeping after every response guarantees evenly spaced request starts.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.

competencies.statement: Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
misconceptions: One global semaphore prevents one origin from being overloaded.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.

competencies.statement: Retry only transient, safe, replayable failures under an attempt and elapsed-time budget and stop on denial or policy signals.
misconceptions: Every timeout, 403, 404, 429, and 503 should receive the same retry policy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retry only transient, safe, replayable failures under an attempt and elapsed-time budget and stop on denial or policy signals.

competencies.statement: Parse applicable Retry-After forms, combine server guidance with bounded exponential backoff and jitter, and prevent amplification.
misconceptions: Exponential backoff alone guarantees polite retries.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse applicable Retry-After forms, combine server guidance with bounded exponential backoff and jitter, and prevent amplification.

competencies.statement: Adjust rate from measured latency, errors, owner constraints, and target concurrency without turning transient fast responses into bursts.
misconceptions: Lower latency always justifies a faster crawl rate.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Adjust rate from measured latency, errors, owner constraints, and target concurrency without turning transient fast responses into bursts.

competencies.statement: Own related crawl tasks in TaskGroup scopes and define how one failure cancels, aggregates, or isolates sibling work.
misconceptions: create_task calls without retained ownership form a reliable worker pool.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Own related crawl tasks in TaskGroup scopes and define how one failure cancels, aggregates, or isolates sibling work.

competencies.statement: Bound frontier and result queues, state who can close them, and make producers wait or shed work under explicit policy.
misconceptions: An asyncio queue is naturally bounded by available memory.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound frontier and result queues, state who can close them, and make producers wait or shed work under explicit policy.

competencies.statement: Acquire global, origin, browser, and output capacity in one documented order and release every permit in finally paths.
misconceptions: Nested semaphores cannot deadlock in a single event loop.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Acquire global, origin, browser, and output capacity in one documented order and release every permit in finally paths.

competencies.statement: Propagate cancellation after bounded cleanup of responses, tasks, queues, browser contexts, checkpoints, and output transactions.
misconceptions: Catching CancelledError and returning normally is safe cleanup.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Propagate cancellation after bounded cleanup of responses, tasks, queues, browser contexts, checkpoints, and output transactions.

competencies.statement: Separate concurrent execution order from stable report order and test changed schedules, partial failure, and cancellation.
misconceptions: Sorting final rows proves the concurrent state machine is correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate concurrent execution order from stable report order and test changed schedules, partial failure, and cancellation.

competencies.statement: Use a dedicated cookie jar, inspect domain, path, Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite, partition, expiry, and redirect scope, and avoid ambient sharing.
misconceptions: Cookies returned by one authorized page are safe on every related host.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use a dedicated cookie jar, inspect domain, path, Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite, partition, expiry, and redirect scope, and avoid ambient sharing.

competencies.statement: Use dedicated least-privilege identities, approved secret sources, documented pages and fields, rotation, revocation, and audit ownership.
misconceptions: A valid username and password authorize automated collection of every visible field.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use dedicated least-privilege identities, approved secret sources, documented pages and fields, rotation, revocation, and audit ownership.

competencies.statement: Restrict crawler navigation to safe retrieval and block logout, unsubscribe, cart, form, API mutation, and side-effecting endpoints.
misconceptions: Following links with GET cannot change server state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Restrict crawler navigation to safe retrieval and block logout, unsubscribe, cart, form, API mutation, and side-effecting endpoints.

competencies.statement: Filter, redact, aggregate, encrypt, retain, and delete private records according to the authorized purpose before export.
misconceptions: Authentication makes all collected private data appropriate to retain.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Filter, redact, aggregate, encrypt, retain, and delete private records according to the authorized purpose before export.

competencies.statement: Close sessions, erase transient credentials and storage, record revocation or logout limits, and verify logs and artifacts contain no secrets.
misconceptions: Process exit reliably clears every credential and browser storage artifact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Close sessions, erase transient credentials and storage, record revocation or logout limits, and verify logs and artifacts contain no secrets.

competencies.statement: Store ETag and Last-Modified with representation identity and issue correct conditional requests without treating validators as content hashes.
misconceptions: An ETag has the same meaning and stability across all origins.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Store ETag and Last-Modified with representation identity and issue correct conditional requests without treating validators as content hashes.

competencies.statement: On 304, reconnect current response metadata to a compatible retained representation and reject missing or mismatched cache state.
misconceptions: A 304 response contains the previously fetched body.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: On 304, reconnect current response metadata to a compatible retained representation and reject missing or mismatched cache state.

competencies.statement: Checkpoint frontier, visited states, response identity, output transaction, schema, and revision atomically or through a replayable log.
misconceptions: Saving only the URL queue is enough to resume exactly.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Checkpoint frontier, visited states, response identity, output transaction, schema, and revision atomically or through a replayable log.

competencies.statement: Reprocess ambiguous in-flight work safely and deduplicate output by stable run, page, record, and schema identities.
misconceptions: A crashed async request is always known to have failed before producing output.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reprocess ambiguous in-flight work safely and deduplicate output by stable run, page, record, and schema identities.

competencies.statement: Distinguish temporary failure, redirect, noindex, permission loss, deletion, and absence from discovery before expiring prior records.
misconceptions: A URL missing from one crawl should be deleted immediately.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish temporary failure, redirect, noindex, permission loss, deletion, and absence from discovery before expiring prior records.

competencies.statement: Keep response-byte, decoded-source, normalized-text, extracted-record, and report hashes distinct and version their transformations.
misconceptions: One SHA-256 value can represent every useful notion of page identity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep response-byte, decoded-source, normalized-text, extracted-record, and report hashes distinct and version their transformations.

competencies.statement: Separate repeated navigation, templates, legal text, and page-specific main content with site-tested rules and retained raw evidence.
misconceptions: The longest text block is always the page main content.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate repeated navigation, templates, legal text, and page-specific main content with site-tested rules and retained raw evidence.

competencies.statement: Use documented tokenization, fingerprints, thresholds, and labeled evaluation and report uncertain similarity without claiming semantic equality.
misconceptions: A high similarity score proves two pages are duplicates.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use documented tokenization, fingerprints, thresholds, and labeled evaluation and report uncertain similarity without claiming semantic equality.

competencies.statement: Treat rel=canonical, redirects, normalized URL keys, exact content, and near duplicates as separate signals that may disagree.
misconceptions: The declared canonical URL is always authoritative and correct.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat rel=canonical, redirects, normalized URL keys, exact content, and near duplicates as separate signals that may disagree.

competencies.statement: Classify transport, metadata, template, content, accessibility, structured-data, and extraction-rule changes with prior and current evidence.
misconceptions: Any changed source digest means stakeholder-visible content changed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify transport, metadata, template, content, accessibility, structured-data, and extraction-rule changes with prior and current evidence.

competencies.statement: Extract title and description candidates with cardinality, location, text quality, changed-case, and stakeholder-specific non-ranking claims.
misconceptions: A title and meta description of a recommended character count prove good search performance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Extract title and description candidates with cardinality, location, text quality, changed-case, and stakeholder-specific non-ranking claims.

competencies.statement: Reconcile redirects, HTTP canonical links, HTML canonical links, sitemap entries, internal links, and content identity without forcing agreement.
misconceptions: One rel=canonical element settles duplicate selection.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile redirects, HTTP canonical links, HTML canonical links, sitemap entries, internal links, and content identity without forcing agreement.

competencies.statement: Parse page-level robots meta and X-Robots-Tag directives by applicable user agent and separate crawling from indexing and serving.
misconceptions: robots.txt nofollow and noindex have identical effects.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse page-level robots meta and X-Robots-Tag directives by applicable user agent and separate crawling from indexing and serving.

competencies.statement: Validate language-region syntax, self and reciprocal links, canonical compatibility, response status, and alternate-set completeness.
misconceptions: Any alternate link with a lang attribute forms a valid hreflang cluster.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate language-region syntax, self and reciprocal links, canonical compatibility, response status, and alternate-set completeness.

competencies.statement: Report status, content type, robots directives, canonical signals, authentication, rendered state, and search-engine-specific limits as evidence, not a guaranteed index outcome.
misconceptions: A technically crawlable page is guaranteed to be indexed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Report status, content type, robots directives, canonical signals, authentication, rendered state, and search-engine-specific limits as evidence, not a guaranteed index outcome.

competencies.statement: Locate JSON-LD scripts, enforce byte and depth limits, parse without fetching remote contexts, preserve duplicates, and surface malformed documents.
misconceptions: JSON-LD parsing should automatically retrieve every referenced context.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Locate JSON-LD scripts, enforce byte and depth limits, parse without fetching remote contexts, preserve duplicates, and surface malformed documents.

competencies.statement: Validate context, graph, type, identifier, required properties, arrays, language, URLs, and supported vocabulary against a versioned policy.
misconceptions: Valid JSON syntax means structured data has valid schema semantics.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate context, graph, type, identifier, required properties, arrays, language, URLs, and supported vocabulary against a versioned policy.

competencies.statement: Compare structured claims with visible page evidence and flag missing, contradictory, hidden, stale, or unverifiable values.
misconceptions: Structured data can truthfully describe content not available to users.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare structured claims with visible page evidence and flag missing, contradictory, hidden, stale, or unverifiable values.

competencies.statement: Audit Open Graph and other selected social fields by declared platform contract, URL identity, image evidence, locale, and fallback behavior.
misconceptions: One universal set of social tags is interpreted identically by every platform.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit Open Graph and other selected social fields by declared platform contract, URL identity, image evidence, locale, and fallback behavior.

competencies.statement: Distinguish syntax, schema, visible-content, vendor-eligibility, policy, rendering, and live search evidence and avoid ranking or display guarantees.
misconceptions: Passing a structured-data validator guarantees a rich result.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish syntax, schema, visible-content, vendor-eligibility, policy, rendering, and live search evidence and avoid ranking or display guarantees.

competencies.statement: Check declared page and part language, document title presence and purpose, and conflicts with observed content while retaining human-review limits.
misconceptions: Any nonempty lang and title values prove readability and identification.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Check declared page and part language, document title presence and purpose, and conflicts with observed content while retaining human-review limits.

competencies.statement: Extract headings, labels, sections, and landmarks in document context and flag missing or misleading structure without enforcing a simplistic numeric ladder.
misconceptions: Every skipped heading rank is automatically a WCAG failure.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Extract headings, labels, sections, and landmarks in document context and flag missing or misleading structure without enforcing a simplistic numeric ladder.

competencies.statement: Classify informative, decorative, functional, complex, grouped, linked, and text images and assess alternative evidence in context.
misconceptions: Every image needs a nonempty alt attribute.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify informative, decorative, functional, complex, grouped, linked, and text images and assess alternative evidence in context.

competencies.statement: Collect link and control text, labels, ARIA naming sources, context, duplicate names, target purpose, and keyboard-relevant markup for review.
misconceptions: Visible text alone always determines an element accessible name and purpose.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Collect link and control text, labels, ARIA naming sources, context, duplicate names, target purpose, and keyboard-relevant markup for review.

competencies.statement: Map each automated finding to testable evidence, confidence, false-positive risk, required manual checks, and no-conformance claim.
misconceptions: Zero automated findings proves WCAG 2.2 conformance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map each automated finding to testable evidence, confidence, false-positive risk, required manual checks, and no-conformance claim.

competencies.statement: Separate queue, DNS, connect, TLS, request, first-byte, body, parse, render, and total timing with clock and instrumentation limits.
misconceptions: One elapsed request duration explains page performance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate queue, DNS, connect, TLS, request, first-byte, body, parse, render, and total timing with clock and instrumentation limits.

competencies.statement: Classify document, stylesheet, script, image, font, media, API, iframe, preload, and redirect resources with initiator and origin.
misconceptions: Counting HTML tags accurately counts every resource a browser loads.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify document, stylesheet, script, image, font, media, API, iframe, preload, and redirect resources with initiator and origin.

competencies.statement: Reconcile compressed transfer, decoded body, cached reuse, duplicate URLs, variant keys, and large-resource policy.
misconceptions: Content-Length equals the user download and memory cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile compressed transfer, decoded body, cached reuse, duplicate URLs, variant keys, and large-resource policy.

competencies.statement: Inspect Cache-Control, Age, validators, Vary, content identity, and browser observations without predicting every intermediary.
misconceptions: A long max-age always means a resource was served from cache.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inspect Cache-Control, Age, validators, Vary, content identity, and browser observations without predicting every intermediary.

competencies.statement: Separate crawler timings, controlled browser lab evidence, field data, accessibility, network profile, device profile, and user experience claims.
misconceptions: Fast crawler retrieval proves fast and usable pages for real users.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate crawler timings, controlled browser lab evidence, field data, accessibility, network profile, device profile, and user experience claims.

competencies.statement: Compare server HTML, embedded data, public API, progressive enhancement, and browser output and render only when the stakeholder evidence requires it.
misconceptions: Modern websites always require a headless browser to scrape correctly.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare server HTML, embedded data, public API, progressive enhancement, and browser output and render only when the stakeholder evidence requires it.

competencies.statement: Use isolated nonpersistent contexts with explicit viewport, locale, timezone, permissions, service-worker, storage, and credential policy.
misconceptions: One shared browser page is isolated enough for all crawl targets.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use isolated nonpersistent contexts with explicit viewport, locale, timezone, permissions, service-worker, storage, and credential policy.

competencies.statement: Route, observe, allow, block, and count document and subresource requests by type, origin, bytes, redirects, and owner policy.
misconceptions: Blocking images alone makes browser crawling bounded and private.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Route, observe, allow, block, and count document and subresource requests by type, origin, bytes, redirects, and owner policy.

competencies.statement: Wait for a stakeholder-defined locator, state, response, or application signal under a deadline and record why the snapshot is ready.
misconceptions: networkidle is a universal proof that dynamic content is complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Wait for a stakeholder-defined locator, state, response, or application signal under a deadline and record why the snapshot is ready.

competencies.statement: Close pages, contexts, browser processes, downloads, traces, temporary storage, and pending routes on success, error, timeout, and cancellation.
misconceptions: Closing the Python process is adequate browser cleanup evidence.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Close pages, contexts, browser processes, downloads, traces, temporary storage, and pending routes on success, error, timeout, and cancellation.

competencies.statement: Detect denial, challenge, login, consent, interstitial, throttling, suspicious redirects, and semantic block pages from multiple signals.
misconceptions: Only 401, 403, and 429 responses indicate blocking.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect denial, challenge, login, consent, interstitial, throttling, suspicious redirects, and semantic block pages from multiple signals.

competencies.statement: Treat CAPTCHA and human-verification challenges as stop and owner-coordination signals rather than puzzles to automate around.
misconceptions: Solving a CAPTCHA automatically is normal crawler reliability work.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Treat CAPTCHA and human-verification challenges as stop and owner-coordination signals rather than puzzles to automate around.

competencies.statement: Use an honest stable identity and refuse proxy rotation, fingerprint spoofing, account cycling, stealth plugins, or other defense evasion.
misconceptions: Rotating IPs and browser fingerprints is equivalent to retry backoff.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use an honest stable identity and refuse proxy rotation, fingerprint spoofing, account cycling, stealth plugins, or other defense evasion.

competencies.statement: Pause, preserve evidence, contact the owner, request an API or export, negotiate rate and fields, and record changed authorization.
misconceptions: The crawler team can infer owner intent from public page behavior without contact.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pause, preserve evidence, contact the owner, request an API or export, negotiate rate and fields, and record changed authorization.

competencies.statement: Test block classification against changed fixtures and require human review before deleting data, escalating, or resuming.
misconceptions: Every page containing words like verify or denied is a confirmed anti-bot block.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test block classification against changed fixtures and require human review before deleting data, escalating, or resuming.

competencies.statement: Allowlist schemes and destinations, reject credentials and dangerous address classes, constrain ports, and separate user input from fetch authority.
misconceptions: Blocking localhost strings prevents SSRF.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Allowlist schemes and destinations, reject credentials and dangerous address classes, constrain ports, and separate user input from fetch authority.

competencies.statement: Resolve and classify every connection destination at the correct time, bind policy to the connected peer where possible, and recheck changes.
misconceptions: Validating the hostname once before queuing prevents DNS rebinding.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve and classify every connection destination at the correct time, bind policy to the connected peer where possible, and recheck changes.

competencies.statement: Apply full destination, credential, DNS, port, method, and budget policy on every redirect and browser subrequest.
misconceptions: Redirects inherit the initial destination authorization.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply full destination, credential, DNS, port, method, and budget policy on every redirect and browser subrequest.

competencies.statement: Disable external entities and network resolution, retain parser protections, cap depth and text, reject archives, and avoid unsafe object deserialization.
misconceptions: HTML and XML parsers cannot perform network or file access.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Disable external entities and network resolution, retain parser protections, cap depth and text, reject archives, and avoid unsafe object deserialization.

competencies.statement: Encode HTML reports, neutralize spreadsheet formulas, validate URLs, escape logs, and keep untrusted content out of commands and templates.
misconceptions: CSV quoting prevents formula execution and every downstream injection.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Encode HTML reports, neutralize spreadsheet formulas, validate URLs, escape logs, and keep untrusted content out of commands and templates.

competencies.statement: Define UTF-8, newline handling, dialect, ordered fields, quoting, formula policy, missing values, limits, and atomic replacement.
misconceptions: Joining values with commas produces portable CSV.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define UTF-8, newline handling, dialect, ordered fields, quoting, formula policy, missing values, limits, and atomic replacement.

competencies.statement: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.
misconceptions: A single giant JSON array is the most resilient streaming format.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.

competencies.statement: Sort by documented semantic keys and stable tie-breakers so concurrency, retries, and resume do not change comparable output.
misconceptions: Filesystem or task completion order is stable enough for reports.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Sort by documented semantic keys and stable tie-breakers so concurrency, retries, and resume do not change comparable output.

competencies.statement: Provide headings, summaries, table headers, scopes, captions, filters, text alternatives, keyboard access, announced updates, reflow, and non-color status.
misconceptions: A colorful sortable table is automatically an accessible report.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide headings, summaries, table headers, scopes, captions, filters, text alternatives, keyboard access, announced updates, reflow, and non-color status.

competencies.statement: Retain decision evidence while removing secrets, unnecessary personal data, query tokens, cookies, source excerpts, and unsafe raw markup by policy.
misconceptions: Complete provenance requires storing every header and source fragment forever.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain decision evidence while removing secrets, unnecessary personal data, query tokens, cookies, source excerpts, and unsafe raw markup by policy.

competencies.statement: Build minimal, representative, malformed, Unicode, oversized, dynamic, accessibility, and changed-site fixtures with exact purpose labels.
misconceptions: Saving one production page is a complete parser test corpus.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build minimal, representative, malformed, Unicode, oversized, dynamic, accessibility, and changed-site fixtures with exact purpose labels.

competencies.statement: Use fake transports for deterministic units and a controlled local server for redirect, streaming, timeout, encoding, cache, and connection evidence.
misconceptions: Live public endpoints are the most realistic and reliable automated tests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use fake transports for deterministic units and a controlled local server for redirect, streaming, timeout, encoding, cache, and connection evidence.

competencies.statement: Test URL resolution, idempotent canonical keys, scope monotonicity, fragment behavior, query policies, and adversarial address forms as properties.
misconceptions: A list of ordinary absolute URLs covers URL policy risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test URL resolution, idempotent canonical keys, scope monotonicity, fragment behavior, query policies, and adversarial address forms as properties.

competencies.statement: Inject DNS, connect, TLS, redirect, truncated body, corrupt encoding, parser, queue, disk, cancellation, browser, and checkpoint failures.
misconceptions: HTTP status fixtures alone cover crawler failure behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inject DNS, connect, TLS, redirect, truncated body, corrupt encoding, parser, queue, disk, cancellation, browser, and checkpoint failures.

competencies.statement: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.
misconceptions: High line coverage proves crawler tests detect meaningful defects.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.

competencies.statement: Trace engine, scheduler, downloader, spider, item pipeline, signals, extensions, requests, responses, failures, and ownership in Scrapy.
misconceptions: A Scrapy spider directly downloads, parses, stores, and retries every page.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace engine, scheduler, downloader, spider, item pipeline, signals, extensions, requests, responses, failures, and ownership in Scrapy.

competencies.statement: Map canonical request identity, priorities, persistence, depth, retries, duplicate filtering, and resume semantics into scheduler evidence.
misconceptions: Scrapy duplicate filtering automatically matches every project URL policy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map canonical request identity, priorities, persistence, depth, retries, duplicate filtering, and resume semantics into scheduler evidence.

competencies.statement: Reason about request and response traversal order, built-in middleware, exceptions, short-circuiting, and settings merge before customization.
misconceptions: Downloader middleware order is irrelevant when every component is enabled.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reason about request and response traversal order, built-in middleware, exceptions, short-circuiting, and settings merge before customization.

competencies.statement: Configure latency target, concurrency, delay bounds, errors, robots and owner limits and treat AutoThrottle as load control, not authorization.
misconceptions: AutoThrottle alone guarantees a polite and authorized crawl.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Configure latency target, concurrency, delay bounds, errors, robots and owner limits and treat AutoThrottle as load control, not authorization.

competencies.statement: Correlate crawl, request, response, page, extraction, queue, retry, block, privacy, output, and recovery events with bounded labels and redaction.
misconceptions: Aggregate request and item counts are sufficient production diagnostics.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Correlate crawl, request, response, page, extraction, queue, retry, block, privacy, output, and recovery events with bounded labels and redaction.

competencies.statement: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.
misconceptions: Environment variables alone form a clear validated crawler interface.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design typed CLI and configuration precedence for targets, policy, budgets, output, dry-run, checkpoint, resume, revision, and secret references.

competencies.statement: Build an import-safe package with declared dependencies, console entry point, resources, metadata, license, and reproducible artifact identity.
misconceptions: A directly executed script is equivalent to an installable package.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build an import-safe package with declared dependencies, console entry point, resources, metadata, license, and reproducible artifact identity.

competencies.statement: Install the immutable artifact into a clean environment and run help, fixture crawl, controlled local crawl, output validation, and clean shutdown.
misconceptions: A wheel that builds successfully is proven runnable.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Install the immutable artifact into a clean environment and run help, fixture crawl, controlled local crawl, output validation, and clean shutdown.

competencies.statement: Define scheduler identity, timezone, missed runs, overlap, distributed lock, lease expiry, idempotency, signal shutdown, and stale-job recovery.
misconceptions: Cron guarantees exactly one crawler run at the intended local time.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define scheduler identity, timezone, missed runs, overlap, distributed lock, lease expiry, idempotency, signal shutdown, and stale-job recovery.

competencies.statement: Set log, trace, checkpoint, raw-source, report, personal-data, backup, deletion, incident, restore, and owner policies and rehearse recovery.
misconceptions: Keeping every crawl artifact indefinitely makes operations safer.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set log, trace, checkpoint, raw-source, report, personal-data, backup, deletion, incident, restore, and owner policies and rehearse recovery.

competencies.statement: Reconcile authorization, scope, robots, HTTP, URL, parse, extraction, crawl graph, metadata, accessibility, output, and changed-case evidence.
misconceptions: Each component passing separately proves the end-to-end crawler result.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile authorization, scope, robots, HTTP, URL, parse, extraction, crawl graph, metadata, accessibility, output, and changed-case evidence.

competencies.statement: Measure pages, resources, bytes, parse time, memory, queue, concurrency, browser load, output, cancellation, and recovery at representative scale.
misconceptions: A high requests-per-second benchmark proves safe production capacity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure pages, resources, bytes, parse time, memory, queue, concurrency, browser load, output, cancellation, and recovery at representative scale.

competencies.statement: Obtain accountable owner, privacy, security, accessibility, data, legal-review, operations, and target-site approvals with expiry and revocation paths.
misconceptions: A developer can self-approve crawler policy because implementation is technical.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Obtain accountable owner, privacy, security, accessibility, data, legal-review, operations, and target-site approvals with expiry and revocation paths.

competencies.statement: Gate immutable artifacts, dependency and parser changes, schemas, checkpoints, clean installs, canaries, monitoring, stop controls, rollback, and restore.
misconceptions: Deploying a new parser or canonicalization rule needs no data migration plan.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Gate immutable artifacts, dependency and parser changes, schemas, checkpoints, clean installs, canaries, monitoring, stop controls, rollback, and restore.

competencies.statement: Defend the system under an unfamiliar site, block, malformed page, privacy request, overload, partial failure, browser fault, and owner revocation and state residual risk.
misconceptions: A polished dashboard and completed crawl are sufficient production defense.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend the system under an unfamiliar site, block, malformed page, privacy request, overload, partial failure, browser fault, and owner revocation and state residual risk.

credential.title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor with Python 3.14 Certificate
